title: Rich Rustic Zanzibari Potato Emulsion
description: A romantic Malaysian dish featuring a creamy potato emulsion made with vegetable stock cube and an egg-free-friendly base.
instructions: Peel and cube the potatoes into small pieces.
Add the cubed potatoes to a pot with water, cover and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer until tender.
Drain the cooked potatoes, reserving about 200 ml of cooking liquid.
In a blender or food processor, combine reserved cooking liquid, vegetable stock cube powder, cream of mushroom soup base, heavy cream, milk, salt, and black pepper. Blend until smooth and creamy.
Pour the blended mixture into a preheated cedar plank, spreading evenly over the surface.
Bake at 180°C (350°F) for 20-25 minutes or until lightly golden on top.
Serve hot as a side dish or with grilled meats and vegetables.
